ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_summary" TEXT /* Summary or description of the event */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., Paid, Free) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the event */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event is featured */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the event */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants the event can accommodate */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Primary organizer of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organizer */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the organizer represents */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organizer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organizer or the organization */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the organizer's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "event_organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-organizer relationship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the organizer in the event (e.g., Primary, Co-organizer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, organizer, admin) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., Adult, Student, Senior) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Number of tickets available */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  "start_sale_date" TEXT /* Date when ticket sales begin */,
  "end_sale_date" TEXT /* Date when ticket sales end */,
  "min_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum number of tickets a user can purchase */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tickets a user can purchase */,
  "refundable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the ticket is refundable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket type purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of tickets purchased */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase (e.g., Completed, Pending, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Attended, Did Not Attend) */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time the user checked in to the event */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time the user checked out from the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the attendance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "title" TEXT /* Brief title for the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sponsor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the sponsor */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sponsors" (
  "event_sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event-sponsor relationship */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "contribution_amount" REAL /* Amount contributed by the sponsor for the event */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsor's contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sponsors_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_sponsors_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)
